/usr/bin/c++ --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_string_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_grade_utils.cpp.o -o run_tests  libproject_lib.a lib/libgtest.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
